sourceCode: _pretenured_524559091_zyIsf: anObject	"Answer an Association between self and anObject"	"The following example creates an association whose key is number 1 and value string 'one'."	"(1 -> 'one') key >>> 1"	"(1 -> 'one') value >>> 'one'"	"Note that key and value can be ANY object."	^ Association _pretenured_524559091_key: self value: anObject
_pretenured_524559091_key: newKey value: newValue	"Answer an instance of me with the arguments as the key and value of	the association."	^ self basicNewTenured key: newKey value: newValue

_pretenured_635805600_at: key ifAbsent: aBlock	"Answer the value associated with the key or, if key isn't found,	answer the result of evaluating aBlock."	^ ((array at: (self findElementOrNil: key))		   ifNil: [ aBlock ]		   ifNotNil: [ :assoc | assoc ]) value

_pretenured_635805600_at: key put: anObject	"Set the value at key to be anObject.  If key is not found, create a	new entry for key and set is value to anObject. Answer anObject."	"(Dictionary new at: #color put: #blue; yourself) >>> (Dictionary new add: #color->#blue; yourself)"	"(Dictionary new at: #color put: #blue; at: #color put: #red; yourself) >>> (Dictionary new add: #color->#red; yourself)"	| index assoc |	index := self findElementOrNil: key.	assoc := array at: index.	assoc		ifNil: [				self					atNewIndex: index					put: (Association _pretenured_635805600_key: key value: anObject) ]		ifNotNil: [ assoc value: anObject ].	^ anObject
_pretenured_635805600_key: newKey value: newValue	"Answer an instance of me with the arguments as the key and value of	the association."	^ self basicNewTenured key: newKey value: newValue

_pretenured_635805600_at: key ifAbsentPut: aBlock	"Return the value at the given key.	If the key is not included in the receiver store and return the result	of evaluating aBlock as the new value."	^ self		  _pretenured_635805600_at: key		  ifAbsent: [ self _pretenured_635805600_at: key put: aBlock value ]
recordData	data add: (self activeProbes collect: [ :probe |			 probe name _pretenured_524559091_zyIsf: probe value ])			asDictionary

initializeOrderedNeighbourhood: k	"Set the neighbourhood of the cell with id = k.Neighbours are ordered anticlockwise, starting from the North cell"	| v i |	v := Array newTenured: 4.	(i := self northCell: k) > 0 ifTrue: [		v at: 1 put: (self elementaryEntitiesAt: i) ].	(i := self westCell: k) > 0 ifTrue: [		v at: 2 put: (self elementaryEntitiesAt: i) ].	(i := self southCell: k) > 0 ifTrue: [		v at: 3 put: (self elementaryEntitiesAt: i) ].	(i := self eastCell: k) > 0 ifTrue: [		v at: 4 put: (self elementaryEntitiesAt: i) ].	^ (self elementaryEntitiesAt: k) neighbourhoodWithNils: v
addOccupant: anObject	(self theOccupants		 _pretenured_635805600_at: anObject class name		 ifAbsentPut: [ OrderedCollection new ]) add: anObject
